mappings.migrationNotes: Build generic steps array in container and map old phase states to StepStatus values.
mappings.decisionRationale: Promoted with generalized API and naming to remove onboarding coupling.

mappings.migrationNotes: Replace placeholder usage with HeroSection and container-provided description.
mappings.decisionRationale: Rejected as net-new because Astra already provides equivalent placeholder composition behavior.

mappings.migrationNotes: Extract modal state into viewmodel/container and bind controlled props/callbacks.
mappings.decisionRationale: Rejected as net-new because Astra already includes equivalent review decision dialog behavior.

breakingChanges.note: Adapter maps domain status to generic panel data

mappings.migrationNotes: Create adapter function in Prana to map sync status fields into generic summary items and actions.
mappings.decisionRationale: Promoted as reusable presentational shell after removing sync-domain assumptions from public contract.

mappings.migrationNotes: Keep local until provider schema and provider-specific copy are externalized into neutral contracts.
mappings.decisionRationale: Domain/provider coupling remains too strong for shared promotion.

mappings.migrationNotes: Keep local until catalog ownership and neutral item DTO contracts are extracted.
mappings.decisionRationale: Onboarding and domain naming coupling remains in public behavior and data model.

mappings.migrationNotes: Keep local until ProfileDto extraction and metadata/editor split are complete.
mappings.decisionRationale: Lifecycle-specific schema assumptions currently prevent a reusable Astra contract.

mappings.oldImport: import { AuthGuard, MainAppGuard, OnboardingGuard, PublicOnlyGuard, ModuleRouteGuard } from 'prana/ui/components/AuthGuard'
mappings.migrationNotes: Keep local until a router/session abstraction is formally added to Astra package contracts.
mappings.decisionRationale: Current Astra package surface does not carry router-bound guard contracts.

breakingChanges.note: Keep branding/title wrapper local in Prana

mappings.migrationNotes: Swap frame import and preserve app-specific title composition in adapter wrapper.
mappings.decisionRationale: Promoted as neutral reusable frame after removing app naming assumptions.

mappings.migrationNotes: Keep local until side-effect orchestration is extracted from the visual interaction bar.
mappings.decisionRationale: Direct channel and workflow orchestration coupling blocks shared promotion.

mappings.migrationNotes: Keep local until lifecycle provider types are replaced by neutral profile view contracts.
mappings.decisionRationale: Lifecycle-specific data model coupling blocks reusable shared API design.

mappings.migrationNotes: Keep orchestration shell local and only promote view-only fragments after extraction.
mappings.decisionRationale: Session and route orchestration policy remains app-local and non-reusable in current form.
